description: Style Note Wear these lightweight floaters from adidas with your shorts and tees this summer. Comfortable yet sturdy, these sandals are great for a stroll in the park or a walk on a trek trail. Product Details Black floaters, leather and mesh straps for breathability, velcro fastening, soft footbed with circular groove pattern for grip, textile cushioning at the collar, rubber outsole with patterned grooves for grip, outsole curves upwards at the toebox for increased protection Material and Care Leather, textile, rubber outsole Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
